cityDNA.coreFantasy: A Persian cliff-terrace capital where covered bazaars, caravan hospitality, law courts, observatories, and refugee commons make welcome accountable.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Ilyr-Qesh is not generic desert-market grandeur; the uploaded images show a formal city where commerce, law, astronomy, route shelter, and refugee care share one civic language.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Hospitality in Ilyr-Qesh is public, recorded, beautiful, and legally tested.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Lapis tile, sandstone, pale marble, silk awnings, blue ceramic, covered bazaars, caravan courts, high courts, star observatories, ration arcades, and cliff terraces.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Persian-coded, formal, mercantile, legal, and cosmopolitan.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Sapphire iwans, painted tiles, covered bazaars, gold seals, caravan gates, witness archives, star gardens, and ration arcades symbolize hospitality under law.

canonLocks: Wonder: Persian Sapphire Iwan of the Star Garden.
Seat of Power: Painted Tiles Sovereign Registry Court.
Districts: Grand Market, Transit / Caravan / Rail, Judicial Quarter, Observatory / Astronomy, Refugee Commons.

Exact anchors include Grand Market Civic Hall, Awning Monument, Auction Court Nook, Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Waystation Hall Nook, Judicial Quarter Hall, High Court, Judicial Quarter Gold-Seal Monument, Witness Archive Nook, Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Star Navigation Monument, Celestial Court Nook, Refugee Commons Civic Hall, Aid Commons, Woven Banners Monument, and Ration Arcade Nook.
provisionalCanon: The city's core virtue is hospitality under law.
The contact-sheet pass reinforces cliff terraces, blue-tile formality, and public obligation rather than luxury alone.
rejectedReads: decorative Persian grandeur without civic obligation
cautionFlags: Do not let the sapphire iwan erase ration arcades and refugee status.

environment.environmentalLogic: The image set uses cliff, terrace, shade, and tile to make arrival, judgment, hospitality, and orientation readable.

forms: Persian Sapphire Iwan of the Star Garden
skyline: Painted Tiles Sovereign Registry Court as authority
Covered Bazaar Beacon as market signal
observatory towers and ration arcades on terraces

civilization.people: Citizens are formal, market-literate, law-conscious, and publicly aware; hospitality is visible and recorded.
civilization.governance: Painted Tiles Sovereign Registry Court balances market visibility, testimony, route access, and aid obligation.
civilization.religion: Star gardens, witness oaths, route blessings, ration obligations, and sapphire iwans make civic hospitality sacred-adjacent.

streets.appearance: Bright, terraced, tiled, formal, and crowded with covered markets, blue iwans, high courts, observatory towers, and ration arcades.
streets.movement: Movement follows bazaar lanes, auction courts, caravan gates, terrace stairs, court approaches, observatory paths, and aid commons routes.
streets.lighting: Hard sunlight is moderated by deep bazaar shade and cool observatory night light.
streets.weatherEffects: Heat, glare, dust wind, and cool night air shape routes.
streets.dayCycle: Bazaars, registries, caravan gates, and aid commons dominate the day.
streets.nightCycle: Bronze lamps, observatory routines, sapphire iwans, and quieter ration arcades dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Tile-fronted terrace homes near courts or observatory routes.
housing.middle: Rooms over bazaar stalls and clerk apartments around shaded courtyards.
housing.poor: Ration-adjacent housing and refugee commons rooms with shared water points.

districts.name: Grand Market
districts.civicPurpose: Public commerce, auction visibility, rumor, and Beacon response.
districts.visualIdentity: Grand Market Civic Hall, Covered Bazaar Beacon, Awning Monument, Auction Court Nook.

districts.name: Transit / Caravan / Rail
districts.civicPurpose: Arrival, route law, hospitality, and long-distance movement.
districts.visualIdentity: Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook.

districts.name: Judicial Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Judgment, testimony, witness records, and legal pressure.
districts.visualIdentity: Judicial Quarter Hall, High Court, Judicial Quarter Gold-Seal Monument, Witness Archive Nook.

districts.name: Observatory / Astronomy
districts.civicPurpose: Navigation, prediction, public sky-reading, and long planning.
districts.visualIdentity: Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Star Navigation Monument, Celestial Court Nook.

districts.name: Refugee Commons
districts.civicPurpose: Refugee care, ration pressure, public obligation, and status disputes.
districts.visualIdentity: Refugee Commons Civic Hall, Aid Commons, Woven Banners Monument, Ration Arcade Nook.

wonder.name: Persian Sapphire Iwan of the Star Garden
wonder.symbolicRole: Celestial order and civic hospitality made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Grand sapphire iwan and star garden of blue tile, terraces, planting, and ceremonial space.
wonder.civicRole: Wonder-scale site for ceremonies, star gatherings, and hospitality oaths.
storyHooks: A ceremony beneath the iwan tests whether beautiful law can feed the vulnerable.

beacon.name: Covered Bazaar Beacon
beacon.visualRole: Beacon rising from covered bazaar shade and auction courts.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates market notices, caravan rumors, court alerts, and aid response.
storyHooks: A Beacon change spreads through market rumor faster than law.

seatOfPower.name: Painted Tiles Sovereign Registry Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Law, record, and imperial order made visible.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Formal tile court with white stone, gold seals, and public stairs.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Government center for trade disputes, testimony, refugee status, route access, and registry records.
storyHooks: A refugee status ruling exposes whether welcome is real.

majorLandmarks.name: Caravanserai
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Shaded caravan court with lodging arches and route boards.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Arrival, lodging, route law, and guest registration.
storyHooks: A guest record changes who the city owes shelter.

majorLandmarks.name: High Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Judicial hall with gold seals and witness archive.
storyHooks: A witness archive proves hospitality was promised first.

majorLandmarks.name: Star Observatory
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Blue-domed observatory with star navigation instruments.
storyHooks: A star reading contradicts court convenience.

majorLandmarks.name: Aid Commons
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Aid commons with ration arcade, water, shade, and queues.
storyHooks: A ration category decides whether welcome is real.

S2: Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook.

mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Persian Sapphire Iwan of the Star Garden, Covered Bazaar Beacon, and Painted Tiles Sovereign Registry Court legible together.
Use lapis tile, cliff terraces, awning shade, legal courts, caravanserais, observatories, and refugee commons.
requiredVisualElements: Persian Sapphire Iwan of the Star Garden
